Wayspot vendor source copy

Package: howl-lua
Remote: git@github.com:LaurenceGuws/howl-lua.git
Tag: v0.1.0-beta.2
Commit: 89617b9f30a595b27c2ec1cc6140026e24b25641

This directory is a repo-local source copy, not a Git submodule or embedded
checkout. Keeping the source files directly in Wayspot makes future clones
portable without requiring submodule initialization while preserving the exact
upstream provenance used by build.zig.zon.
